title: Inventory viewer + business system expansion
changes: Fixed BusinessTransaction enum missing 'shop' type (shop purchases were saving with an invalid type)
Added 'adjust', 'transfer_out', 'transfer_in' transaction types to the enum
New /businessleaderboard command — ranks all server businesses by balance
New /businessinfo command — public view of any business (balance, passive income, role, inventory count)
New /businesstransfer command — transfer funds between two businesses with source password auth
New /businessadjust command (staff only) — add, remove, or set a business balance directly from Discord
Added Ledger button to the /business Discord interface — shows last 15 transactions inline
Dashboard: added Business Balance Management section — staff can add/remove/set balance from the web UI
Dashboard: Business Balance Management logs an 'adjust' transaction for full audit trail
/inventory now accepts an optional @user — view any member's inventory the same way /balance works
